title: Prohibited agreements and actions of professional licensing boards and commissions
doc_html:
§23.3. Prohibited agreements and actions of professional licensing boards and commissions

            A. No professional or occupational licensing board or commission shall:

            (1) Enter into a consent decree with a licensee, permittee, or certificate holder if such decree contains a nondisparagement clause. Such a nondisparagement clause contained in a consent decree is contrary to public policy of this state and shall be null, void, and unenforceable.

            (2) Initiate disciplinary action against a licensee, permittee, or certificate holder for providing testimony or records to a legislative body.

            B. For the purposes of this Section, a "legislative body" shall include but not be limited to a legislative committee, subcommittee, or task force.

            Acts 2019, No. 179, §1.
doc_text:
§23.3.  Prohibited agreements and actions of professional licensing boards and commissions
A.  No professional or occupational licensing board or commission shall:
(1)  Enter into a consent decree with a licensee, permittee, or certificate holder if such
decree contains a nondisparagement clause. Such a nondisparagement clause contained in
a consent decree is contrary to public policy of this state and shall be null, void, and
unenforceable.
(2)  Initiate disciplinary action against a licensee, permittee, or certificate holder for
providing testimony or records to a legislative body.
B.  For the purposes of this Section, a "legislative body" shall include but not be
limited to a legislative committee, subcommittee, or task force.
Acts 2019, No. 179, §1.
